favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet — click the star in the mirror list to save one

footer.description:
This site was established with the support of the Information Office of Chongqing University and is operated and maintained by Chongqing University Lanunion, providing fast software download services for both university members and external users.
The mirror synchronization tool used by this site is forked from the Mirror Manager project developed by the Tsinghua University TUNA Association. The frontend of this mirror site is built upon the open-source mirror site frontend project developed by Jingchu University of Technology, with further customization and development by our team.
In accordance with applicable laws and regulations, this site does not provide services to users located in the European Union.
This site does not provide services to users who abuse mirror resources. Various technical measures may be employed to mitigate abuse and defend against malicious activities and attacks.

error.notFoundDesc: The mirror or page you are looking for does not exist.
error.desc403: You do not have permission to access this resource. Please make sure you are on the campus network or contact the administrator.
error.desc404: The mirror or page you are looking for does not exist. Please check the URL.
error.desc500: The server encountered an unexpected error. We are working on it. Please try again later.
error.desc502: The upstream service is temporarily unavailable. This is usually a temporary issue — please refresh.
error.desc503: The mirror is under maintenance or experiencing high load. Please try again later.
error.descDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again later or go back to home.

logStream.waitingHint: Sync task not started or just finished; log will stream on next sync
